nasb.text: His anger has torn me and hunted me down, He has gnashed at me with His teeth; My adversary glares at me.

esv.text: He has torn me in his wrath and hated me; he has gnashed his teeth at me; my adversary sharpens his eyes against me.

cnv.text: 他的怒氣撕裂我，攻擊我； 他向我咬牙切齒， 我的敵人以銳利的眼光看著我。

ccb.text: 上帝在愤怒中撕裂我，迫害我， 向我咬牙切齿； 仇敌恶狠狠地盯着我。
